overall_justification: The newspaper edition mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" multiple times, but primarily in brief, factual reports related to financial transactions.  There is no in-depth discussion or clear editorial position taken on the merits or drawbacks of the Caixa itself, its proposed conversion rate, or its broader economic implications. The mentions are transactional, not argumentative.

supporting_evidence.quote: Essa quantia foi recolhida pela Caixa de Conversão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: A factual statement about funds collected, indicating the Caixa's operational role.

supporting_evidence.quote: Entraram ante-hontem para a Caixa de Conversão 26:461$000 réis, correspondentes ás letras, e 26:461$000 réis, correspondentes a notas conversiveis emittidas.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Another purely factual report of financial transactions related to the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: Entraram, hontem, na Caixa de Conversão as letras e as apolices correspondentes ás notas conversiveis emittidas.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Similar to the previous quote, this reinforces the neutral and factual nature of the mentions.
